title: Sr. Staff UX/UI Engineer - AI-Powered Design Systems
company_focus: Energy technology and electrification for zero-carbon future
description:
Job Description SummaryWe are seeking an innovative UX/UI
engineer who has mastered the integration of AI tools into
the modern design and development workflow. This role
requires someone who views AI not as a replacement for
design thinking but as a powerful accelerator for creating
exceptional user experiences. You'll be at the intersection
of design and engineering, building sophisticated interfaces
that seamlessly incorporate AI-powered features while
maintaining the human-centered design principles that define
great products. The ideal candidate will have 8+ years of
experience crafting user experiences and interfaces, with
proven expertise in both design and front-end
implementation. You will shape how users interact with AI-
native applications, designing intuitive interfaces for
complex AI features while ensuring accessibility, usability,
and delight. This is an opportunity to define the future of
human-AI interaction at scale. As a GE Vernova accelerator,
GE Vernova Advanced Research is driving strategy and leading
research & development efforts to execute on the business's
mission to help power the energy transition. We forge the
collaborations and help invent the technologies required to
electrify and decarbonize for a zero-carbon future.
Representing virtually every major scientific and
engineering discipline, our researchers are collaborating
with GE Vernova's businesses, the U.S. government, and more
than 420 entities at the forefront of technology to execute
on 150+ energy-focused projects. Collectively, these
research programs and initiatives aim to solve near term
technical challenges, deliver next generation product
advances, and drive long term breakthrough innovation to
enable more affordable, reliable, sustainable, and secure
energy. About the team Our Design & Product team is
pioneering the future of human-AI interaction, creating
experiences that make advanced AI capabilities accessible to
thousands of users. We believe that AI should augment human
capability, not complicate it, and that great design is
essential to achieving this vision. Our culture emphasizes
rapid prototyping, user feedback, and continuous iteration.
We host regular design critiques and AI-UX workshops. Team
members have access to cutting-edge AI tools and dedicated
time for experimentation and learning.

Job Description

As a UX/UI Engineer, you will bridge design and engineering
to create AI-enhanced user experiences that are both
powerful and approachable.

Design & User Experience:

- Design and prototype user interfaces that make complex AI
  capabilities accessible and intuitive for users
- Create design systems and component libraries that
  standardize AI interaction patterns across products
- Conduct user research to understand how people interact with
  AI features and iterate based on behavioral insights
- Design conversational interfaces, prompt builders, and
  feedback mechanisms for AI-powered features
- Develop information architecture for applications
  incorporating semantic search, recommendations, and AI-
  generated content
- Create responsive, accessible designs that meet WCAG 2.1 AA
  standards and Section 508 compliance

Implementation & Development:

- Transform designs into production-ready code using modern
  front-end frameworks (React, Vue, Angular)
- Build reusable UI components that elegantly handle AI states
  (loading, streaming responses, error handling)
- Implement real-time interfaces for AI features including
  chat interfaces, live previews, and progressive disclosure
- Develop interactive visualizations for AI model outputs,
  confidence scores, and decision explanations
- Create smooth animations and micro-interactions that provide
  feedback during AI processing

AI Integration & Innovation:

- Leverage AI design tools (Figma AI, Framer AI, Galileo AI)
  to accelerate design iteration and prototyping
- Use AI coding assistants to rapidly implement and test
  design variations
- Design and implement A/B testing frameworks for AI feature
  adoption and usability
- Create intuitive controls for AI parameters (temperature,
  context, model selection) accessible to non-technical
  users
- Develop patterns for graceful degradation when AI services
  are unavailable
- Design transparency features that help users understand AI
  decision-making

Collaboration & Process:

- Partner with AI/ML engineers to understand technical
  constraints and possibilities
- Work with product managers to define AI feature requirements
  and success metrics
- Collaborate with content strategists to develop AI
  interaction copy and guidelines
- Conduct design reviews focusing on AI-human interaction
  patterns
- Document design decisions, AI interaction patterns, and
  component usage guidelines
- Mentor team members on designing for AI-augmented
  experiences

BASIC QUALIFICATIONS

- Master’s Degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering,
  or related disciplines
- 3+ years of experience as a UX designer, UI engineer,
  product designer, or front-end engineer similar role
- 2+ years of using design tools like Figma, Sketch, or Adobe
  XD to create interactive prototypes and design systems
- 2+ years of experience implementing designs in production
  using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript/TypeScript
- Experience with modern front-end frameworks (React, Vue, or
  Angular) and state management
- Portfolio demonstrating shipped products with thoughtful
  user experiences and polished interfaces
- Experience designing and implementing responsive, mobile-
  first interfaces
- Understanding of accessibility standards and inclusive
  design principles
- Experience with version control systems (Git) and
  collaborative development workflows
- Must be willing to work out of an office located in
  Bangalore JFWTC Campus
- You must submit your application for employment on the
  careers page at www.careers.gevernova.com to be considered

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

- 8+ years of combined experience in UX/UI design and front-
  end development
- Experience designing interfaces for AI-powered features
  (chatbots, recommendation systems, search, etc.)
- Hands-on experience with AI design tools (Figma AI, Framer,
  Galileo AI, Uizard)
- Proficiency with CSS frameworks (Tailwind CSS, Material-UI)
  and animation libraries (Framer Motion, GSAP)
- Experience with design tokens and building themeable
  component systems
- Knowledge of prompt engineering for AI-assisted design and
  content generation
- Experience conducting usability testing for AI features and
  interpreting user feedback
- Understanding of machine learning concepts and how they
  impact user experience
- Experience with data visualization libraries (D3.js,
  Chart.js, Recharts)
- Familiarity with WebGL/Three.js for advanced visualizations
- Experience designing for voice interfaces or conversational
  AI
- Background in human-computer interaction, cognitive science,
  or psychology
- Experience with design ops and scaling design systems across
  large organizations

Technical Stack

Design Tools: Figma, Sketch, Adobe Creative Suite,
Principle, ProtoPie

AI Design Tools: Figma AI features, Framer AI, Galileo AI,
Magician, Uizard Frontend: React/Next.js, Vue.js,
TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS Component Libraries:
Storybook, Bit, Material-UI, Ant Design, Shadcn/ui
Animation: Framer Motion, GSAP, Lottie, CSS animations,
React Spring Visualization: D3.js, Chart.js, Recharts,
Three.js for 3D interfaces

Development Tools: VS Code, GitHub Copilot, Chrome DevTools,
Figma Dev Mode

Testing: Jest, React Testing Library, Playwright,
accessibility testing tools Collaboration: Figma, FigJam,
Miro, Linear, Slack

What We're Looking For

Design Excellence: You have a strong aesthetic sense and
attention to detail, creating interfaces that are both
beautiful and functional. You understand that great AI
experiences require exceptional design, not despite the
complexity but because of it.

Technical Proficiency: You're equally comfortable in Figma
and VS Code, able to design sophisticated interfaces and
implement them with clean, maintainable code. You understand
the technical constraints of AI systems and design
accordingly.

AI-Augmented Workflow: You leverage AI tools to accelerate
your design and development process while maintaining
creative control and quality. You're excited about how AI
can enhance rather than replace human creativity.

User Advocacy: You're passionate about creating inclusive,
accessible experiences that work for all users. You
understand the unique challenges of designing AI interfaces
that build trust and understanding.

Systems Thinking: You approach design systematically,
creating scalable patterns and components that maintain
consistency across complex products. You think about edge
cases, error states, and graceful failures.

Continuous Learning: You stay current with evolving design
trends, AI capabilities, and front-end technologies. You're
excited about the rapidly changing landscape of AI-UX
design.

Additional Information

Relocation Assistance Provided: Yes

Build reusable UI components that handle AI states including loading, streaming responses, and error handling
Implement real-time interfaces for AI features including chat interfaces, live previews, and progressive disclosure
Create design systems and component libraries that standardize AI interaction patterns across products
Develop interactive visualizations for AI model outputs, confidence scores, and decision explanations
Design conversational interfaces, prompt builders, and feedback mechanisms for AI-powered features
Partner with AI/ML engineers to understand technical constraints and possibilities for design implementation
use_cases: Chat interfaces and conversational AI interactions
Real-time streaming AI responses with progressive disclosure
AI model output visualization with confidence scores and explanations

ai_classification_reasoning:
This role focuses on designing and implementing user
interfaces FOR AI-powered applications, not building or
deploying AI models. The work involves creating UX patterns
for AI features, building front-end components that consume
AI APIs, and designing interaction patterns. While it
requires understanding AI capabilities, the core work is
front-end development and design, not hands-on model
development or deployment.
